title: Design System: Beauty by Raquel Nicole

display.purpose: Hero H1 and major page titles only.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on seamless cards and hero image.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default 300ms transitions on buttons and cards.

motion.name: ease-section
motion.purpose: Section fade/slide entrances via Framer Motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion action. Label is always Book Appointment.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FF5C32; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Montserrat, Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.15s ease; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(255, 92, 50, 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E04820; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5C32; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined alternative when a second action is required on the same block.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #FF5C32; font-family: Montserrat, Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 48px; border: 2px solid #FF5C32; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #FF5C32; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5C32; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field used on booking and bridal forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #3D3632; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 16px; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; color: #3D3632; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #D1D5DB; border-radius: 8px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FF5C32; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(61, 54, 50, 0.5); }

components.name: Site Header
components.description: Sticky top nav with wordmark, links, phone, and Book CTA.
components.html:
Beauty by Raquel Nicole
ServicesGallery
Book Appointment
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 12px 24px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 143, 171, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(61, 54, 50, 0.06); } .ds-logo { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #3D3632; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav a { font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #3D3632; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: #FF5C32; } .ds-header-cta { background: #FF5C32; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header-cta:hover { background: #E04820; }

components.name: Trust Badge Chip
components.description: Pill chip for review count or specialty labels.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 14px; min-height: 44px; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #3D3632; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Seamless Card
components.description: Default content container for forms, trust blocks, and review cards.
components.html:
Lived-In Color

Balayage and highlights that grow out softly.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 184, 168, 0.45); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(61, 54, 50, 0.08); transition: box-shadow 0.5s, transform 0.5s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(61, 54, 50, 0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #3D3632; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(61, 54, 50, 0.85); margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

narrative.overview: A independent salon site where color does the talking before copy does. Surfaces carry coral and rose warmth at a committed level, while typography stays classic and readable. Photo-forward, bookable, and local to Milford.
keyCharacteristics: Committed warm palette: coral peach, rose pink, orange CTA on blush-white ground
DM Serif Display headlines + Lato body + Montserrat uppercase buttons
Soft rounded cards (16px) with light shadows
Mobile-first spacing with generous section breathing room

rules.name: The One Orange Rule
rules.body: Every primary action uses CTA Orange. Do not introduce teal, purple, or navy CTAs on the same page.

rules.name: The Committed Color Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds may use gradients and tints. Restrained all-white pages fail the brand brief.

rules.name: The Script Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Dancing Script appears for decorative accents only, never for prices, policies, or form labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows signal hierarchy (cards, floating header, hero image). Body text blocks stay flat.

dos: Do use the coral-rose-orange token set on every page section; alternate blush gradients with white content bands.
Do lead with real photography and keep alt text honest.
Do keep one booking label: Book Appointment, linked to Square.
Do cap body copy near 65ch and use DM Serif for section headlines only.
Do maintain 48px minimum touch targets on mobile CTAs and nav items.
donts: Don't revert to muted beige-on-beige palettes that read as plain or generic salon templates.
Don't use gradient text, colored side-stripe borders, or glassmorphism as decoration.
Don't ship identical three-column feature card grids for services or trust blocks.
Don't use em dashes in user-facing copy; use commas, periods, or hyphens.
Don't add dark-mode purple gradients, neon glows, or SaaS hero-metric layouts.
Don't invent fake review stats or best stylist SEO phrasing.
